---
title: "William Crawley Yonge"
---

## William Crawley Yonge

**Dates:** (2 June 1795-26 Feb 1854)

### Description

father of CMY

### Biography

He married (25 Oct 1822) Frances Mary Bargus.
His funeral was held on Saturday 4 March 1854.

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 26th 1899
- [To Mrs Swinton, Sunday Aug 13th [1899[[footnote:1]]]](../letters/3417_To_Mrs_Swinton.html)
- Letter from Sept 24th [1897 or later?[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from December 8, 1896.
- Letter from June 2nd 1896
- Letter from Mar 5th 1896
- Letter from  [August 1893]
- Letter from Sept 9th 1890
- Letter from June 14th 1890
- Letter from June 10th 1889
- Letter from May 3d 1888
- Letter from [late 1885?]
- Letter from Aug 21st [1881]
- Letter from October 1, 1878
- Letter from September 22, 1878
- Letter from August 2, 1870.
- Letter from August 9. [1869]
- Letter from Feb 15th 1869
- Letter from October 8, 1868
- Letter from October 5, 1868

*... and 44 more letters*

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
